name: Lemon-Coconut Squares
recipeIngredient: Self-rising flour can be used in this recipe; omit salt and baking soda.
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Mix flour, margarine, and powdered sugar. Press into an ungreased square pan (8 x 8 x 2 or 9 x 9 x 2 inches), building up 1/2-inch edges. Bake for 20 minutes. Beat remaining ingredients for about 3 minutes until light and fluffy. Pour over hot crust. Bake for another 25 minutes, or until no indentation remains when touched lightly in the center; cool. Sprinkle with powdered sugar if desired. Cut into 1-1/2 inch squares (approximately 25 squares, 100 calories per square).
